mapper.select: select record_code as recordId, coaching_type as coachingType, coaching_detail as coachingDetail, course_content as courseContent, mentor_name as mentor, mentor_role as mentorRole, date_format(class_date, '%m/%d') as classDate, date_format(class_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as classDateRaw, case is_new when '1' then true else false end as isNew, duration_label as duration, coalesce(cast(rating_score as char), '') as ratingScoreValue, coalesce(rating_tags, '') as ratingTags, coalesce(rating_feedback, '') as ratingFeedback from osg_student_course_record where user_id = #{userId} order by class_date desc, course_record_id desc
mapper.update: update osg_student_course_record set rating_score = #{ratingScore}, rating_tags = #{ratingTags}, rating_feedback = #{ratingFeedback}, is_new = '0', update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and record_code = #{recordId}
